overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a cobblestone mountain path during a dark, stormy night. The environment features rocky canyon walls, sparse dead trees, and thick atmospheric fog. A humanoid figure appears ahead on the path toward the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with steep walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path through the narrow canyon

entered.detail: wet reflective cobblestone trail winding through the canyon
steep dark rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rocky cliff rising on the right side of the path
dark turbulent storm clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, stormy mountain canyon. Wet cobblestones line the path between steep rocky walls while dark storm clouds obscure the sky. The atmosphere is misty and foreboding with minimal vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with scattered dead trees

events.description: canyon walls recede and path opens to reveal wider mountain vista

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment opens up to show more of the mountainous terrain

entered.detail: twisted dead tree with bare branches silhouetted against the storm sky
shadowy mountain silhouette visible through the mist in the distance
small dilapidated wooden structure or shack beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path emerges from the narrow canyon into a slightly more open mountain trail. Twisted dead trees line the route and a distant mountain peak becomes visible through the haze. A small wooden ruin appears on the right side as the camera continues forward.

events.description: humanoid figure appears standing in the middle of the cobblestone path ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a figure standing motionless in the middle of the path

notable_agents.action: standing still in the middle of the path facing the camera, appearing as a warrior or traveler

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues along the path, a humanoid figure suddenly appears standing ahead in the middle of the cobblestone trail. The figure remains motionless facing the camera as the player approaches, creating a tense encounter in the stormy mountain environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a stormy mountain pass that evolves from a claustrophobic canyon into a tense encounter on an open trail. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor of steep rocky walls and wet cobblestones under a dark, obscured sky. As the path emerges from the canyon, the environment opens up to reveal twisted dead trees and a distant mountain peak shimmering through the thick haze. The scene then expands further to pass a small wooden ruin on the right before the camera continues forward along the trail. Finally, the movement slows as a motionless humanoid figure suddenly appears in the middle of the path, standing silhouetted against the foreboding landscape.
